title: Lands of the Valkyrie
description: A modpack based around Valkyrien Skies and AmpXtreme
body:
The Lands of the Valkyrie are an impossible place. With pillars, caves, and floating islands all stretching tretching literal miles heavensward, the mere act of traversing and surviving in Valkyrie is a complex, daunting task... But the people of this world have adapted.

- Explore magical new world generation!
  - AmpXtreme, Oh the Biomes We've Gone, and Ice and Fire combine to make the overworld intimidatingly fantastical.
  - Amplified Nether and Cinderscapes combine to make the Nether more hellish than ever.
  - BetterEnd and True Ending transform the End into an alien new world.
- Traverse the world your own way with Origins:
  - As a Feline, leaping from block to block, falling gracefully from great heights.
  - As an Arachnid, steadily climbing the great pillars of stone until you stand above all.
  - As an Enderian, teleporting from island to island, the impossible chasms between them rendered meaningless to you.
  - As a Elytrian, weaving gracefully through it all, master of the Valkyrie's most plentiful element - sky.
  - And more!
- Develop industry among the clouds, and connect far-flung bases with Create and Clockwork.
  - Physics-based, block-built ships allow for gorgeous airships and even mobile bases!
- And other fun things!
  - Craft paragliders to assist with basic transportation with the Gliders Mod!
  - Make the kitchen the heart of your home with Farmer's delight!
  - And so, so much more!
